sections_cleaned.details: Removed "$JOBS_DIR/pending-talent.json" and "$JOBS_DIR/pending-talent-profiles.json" from git status change detection
Removed resources/jobs/pending-talent.json and resources/jobs/pending-talent-profiles.json from upload-artifact path list

sections_cleaned.section: Commit and push generated changes (git add)

confirmation.grep_for_stale_refs: No remaining references to pending-talent in jobs-sync.yml
confirmation.no_other_stale_workflows: grep across entire repo found pending-talent references ONLY in audit report files (reports/talent-pipeline-audit.*), not in any workflow files

what_was_not_affected: scripts/fetch-approved-talent.js — still fetches getPendingTalent/getApprovedTalent from GAS backend
scripts/fetch-approved-talent.js — still merges approved profiles into talent-profiles.json via writeJsonIfChanged
admin-review.html — still loads pending talent via requestAdmin('getPendingTalent') from GAS backend in real-time
admin-review.html — still loads active talent via LOCAL_TALENT_URL = './talent-profiles.json'
index.html — still fetches talent-profiles.json for public display
backend/apps-script/Code.gs — GAS pending talent endpoints (getPendingTalent, getApprovedTalent, approveTalent, rejectTalent, submitTalent) are untouched
talent-profiles.json references — preserved in all 3 workflow sections (git status, artifact, git add)
